# Natalia Ivakina – Full Stack Developer

> Portfolio of Natalia Ivakina, Full Stack Developer based in Moncton, New Brunswick, Canada.

## About

Natalia Ivakina is a Full Stack Developer specializing in web and mobile application development. Her experience includes React, Flutter, Angular, Node.js, Shopify customization, REST APIs, SQL databases, and UI development.

She also has a background in software testing (QA) and urban planning.

## Skills

- React
- Flutter
- Angular
- JavaScript
- TypeScript
- Node.js
- Express
- HTML
- CSS
- Shopify
- Liquid
- C#
- SQL
- MongoDB
- MySQL
- REST API
- Git
- GitHub

## Projects

### Binary Cat Mobile App

Educational Android application for learning binary arithmetic.

Technologies:
- Flutter
- Dart
- Google Play

https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.binary_calc

---

### Motion Designer Platform

Web application for managing motion design portfolios and videos.

Technologies:
- React
- Node.js
- Express
- REST API

https://akialex.com/

---

### Bedores Gallery

Custom Shopify art gallery platform.

Technologies:
- Shopify
- Liquid
- HTML
- CSS
- JavaScript

https://bedoresgallery.com/

---

### Jewellery Art Website

SEO-focused website for handcrafted crystal jewellery.

Technologies:
- HTML
- CSS
- JavaScript

https://ivamage.com/

---

### Golf Course Management

Management platform with data visualization.

Technologies:
- Angular
- Node.js
- MySQL

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gBV9CulLpPs
